description: Hard state for AI agents: typed, governed, durable state with deterministic queries, governed writes, and receipts.
rules: Always validate config with cruxible_validate before cruxible_init
Ingest entities before relationships — edges reference entity IDs
Use cruxible_add_relationship for inferred relationships, not batch CSV scripts
Include source, confidence, and evidence in edge properties for provenance
Use the instance_id from cruxible_init in all subsequent tool calls
